user_request: 你别分析，直接给我能发给团队执行的东西。
english_translation: Don't analyze. Give me something I can send to the team to execute directly.

parsed_intent.intent_summary: User wants operational instructions that can be immediately executed by a team
parsed_intent.real_goal: Get a ready-to-execute instruction block that team members can follow directly
parsed_intent.deliverable: Concise, step-by-step operational instruction block (no theory, no explanation)
forbidden_actions: Do not include 'how it works' sections
